introSection: Dino Chase (formerly known as Flying Frog) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Paultons Park in Romsey, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride first opened in 2003 as Flying Frog.

In 2016, when the Lost Kingdom was added, Flying Frog was rethemed to Dino Chase. It is the third coaster in the area, the other two being Velociraptor and Flight of the Pterosaur. However, it is the only coaster that isn't brand-new, having opened 13 years before the Lost Kingdom area.

fullText:
Dino Chase (formerly known as Flying Frog) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Paultons Park in Romsey, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

The ride first opened in 2003 as Flying Frog.

In 2016, when the Lost Kingdom was added, Flying Frog was rethemed to Dino Chase. It is the third coaster in the area, the other two being Velociraptor and Flight of the Pterosaur. However, it is the only coaster that isn't brand-new, having opened 13 years before the Lost Kingdom area.

Oval track layout.
